entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Limitations (acceptable for MVP):
  - No disc streaming (but compression handles large models)
  - No parallel compression (but fast enough single-threaded)
  - No cloud APIs (but local models work perfectly)
  - Basic quantization (but sufficient for MVP)

  These need to be fully implemeented and beyond enterprise standard IE reverse error logging and more gguf loading features that work, IE all the gguf stuff needs to be fully compatable '
